# Disaster-stop sweep — MEANREV_FADE_2M

**Dataset:** `src/data/MNQ_2m_12mo_databento.csv` (176,350 2-min bars, 2025-06-15 .. 2026-06-14) · **friction:** 1.0 pt · **$ conv:** MNQ $2/pt · **generated by** `research/disaster_stop_sweep.py`

Characterization only — engine unchanged, no tuning. The stop is overlaid on the verified stopless signal stream (it changes loser exits, not entries). `none` reproduces the verified run as the baseline. Stop fills assumed exactly at the stop price (optimistic vs real slippage).

### Full 12-month

| 1.5 | 191 | 53% | +6884 | 4.37 | -447 | $-894 | 88 | 103 |
| 2.0 | 191 | 60% | +7147 | 4.33 | -354 | $-708 | 71 | 120 |

| 3.0 | 191 | 67% | +7057 | 3.88 | -306 | $-612 | 52 | 139 |
| 4.0 | 191 | 69% | +7855 | 4.61 | -267 | $-535 | 33 | 158 |
| none (verified) | 191 | 70% | +8080 | 5.06 | -246 | $-491 | 0 | 191 |
